response.text:

rationale: Your SoC of 0.35 is below my minimum sharing threshold of 0.6, and my own reserves are declining; conservative policy requires I buffer capacity before sharing further.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Geographic neighbors are in deficit; my SoC is declining despite accepting their requests, suggesting I should conserve and only share when well-buffered..
